{
  GeneratedSources: [
    {
      HintName: Order.g.cs,
      Content:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class Order
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Determines whether this Order is equal to another based on their values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override bool EqualsCore(Order other)
        {
            if (!SequenceEquals(Items, other.Items, true)) return false;
            if (!EqualityComparer<string>.Default.Equals(OrderId, other.OrderId)) return false;
            if (!SequenceEquals(Tags, other.Tags, false)) return false;
            return true;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a hash code for this value object's values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override int GetHashCodeCore()
        {
            var hashCode = new HashCode();

            if (Items != null)
            {
                foreach (var item in Items)
                    hashCode.Add(item);
            }
            hashCode.Add(OrderId);
            if (Tags != null)
            {
                foreach (var item in Tags)
                    hashCode.Add(item);
            }

            return hashCode.ToHashCode();
        }

        private static bool SequenceEquals<T>(IEnumerable<T>? first, IEnumerable<T>? second, bool orderMatters)
        {
            if (ReferenceEquals(first, second)) return true;
            if (first is null || second is null) return false;

            return orderMatters
                ? first.SequenceEqual(second)
                : first.OrderBy(x => x).SequenceEqual(second.OrderBy(x => x));
        }

    }
}

    }
  ]
}
